untranslatable_reason: Signal requires lagged momentum signals (longs/shorts vectors) computed from undisclosed lookback_period, threshold, and half_life parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT. The backshift(h) lag parameter and exact holddays value are not specified. The underlying momentum computation logic cannot be reconstructed from allowed indicators. Entry/exit conditions depend on internal momentum state variables not available in standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is an interday momentum strategy with position-rolling logic. The core mechanism uses lagged boolean signals (longs, shorts) that increment/decrement position size over a specified hold period. Without the momentum calculation parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) and the exact lag (h) and hold days, a precise translation is impossible. The strategy is directionally agnostic (CONTEXT_DEPENDENT) and rebalances daily. Backtested Sharpe: 4.1 (May-Dec 2007); 0.83 (1947-2007 benchmark).
